description_long: This is a dark green, single-propeller military-style airplane with a streamlined fuselage and elliptical wings, reminiscent of World War II fighter aircraft. The wings are mid-mounted and feature subtle roundels and insignia, with the number '23' and other markings visible on the fuselage. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed with a clear canopy. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The surface finish is matte, and the airplane is constructed primarily from metal, likely with some glass and rubber components.
description: A dark green, single-propeller military-style airplane with elliptical mid-mounted wings, an enclosed cockpit, and taildragger landing gear. Markings and insignia are visible on the fuselage and wings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elliptical wingspan, single propeller, and narrow fuselage profile.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cockpit canopy, fuselage markings, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the propeller, cockpit, and additional fuselage insignia.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight elliptical wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
